privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At YO Dijital Medya A.Ş. ("YoAi", "we"), we take the security of your personal data seriously. This policy explains what data we collect when you use the YoAi platform, how we use it, how long we keep it, and your rights.

privacyPolicy.section1Content: This policy applies to the services provided through the YoAi website and YoAi SaaS dashboard.
privacyPolicy.section2Content: YoAi is a platform that helps users connect their ad accounts to view performance data, run reporting, and (where applicable) perform certain ad management actions.
privacyPolicy.section3Title: 3) Connected Integrations and Types of Data Accessed
privacyPolicy.section3MetaContent:
When a user connects their Meta account via Facebook Login, YoAi requests access to the following categories of data, each tied to a specific permission scope:

(a) Advertising Data (ads_read, ads_management, pages_manage_ads): Ad account identifiers, campaigns, ad sets, ads, budgets, bid strategies, targeting settings, and performance metrics (impressions, clicks, spend, conversions, ROAS).

(b) Page Data (pages_show_list, pages_read_engagement, pages_manage_posts): Facebook Page names, IDs, profile pictures, engagement metrics, published posts (text, images, videos, permalinks), and the ability to publish content (feed posts, Reels) to the user's own Facebook Page.

(c) Lead Data (leads_retrieval): Active lead generation forms associated with connected Pages, including form names, field configurations, and submitted lead entries (name, email, phone, and other fields defined by the advertiser).

(d) Business Data (business_management): Business Manager account identifiers and names, owned Pages, and owned WhatsApp Business Accounts — used to map organizational assets.

(e) Instagram Data (instagram_basic, instagram_content_publish): Instagram Business Account profile information (username, profile picture), published media (images, videos, captions, permalinks), and the ability to publish content (feed posts, Reels, Stories) to the user's Instagram Business Account.

(f) WhatsApp Data (whatsapp_business_management, whatsapp_business_messaging): WhatsApp Business Account identifiers, associated phone numbers (display number, verified name, quality rating), and the ability to create Click-to-WhatsApp (CTWA) ad destinations.

All Meta data is used exclusively to provide the ad management, reporting, and campaign creation features within the YoAi platform. Data is not transferred to third parties, sold, or used for purposes unrelated to the user's advertising operations.
privacyPolicy.section3GoogleContent: The user grants access to their Google Ads account via Google OAuth. Data accessed includes Google Ads customer account ID, ad entities such as campaigns/ad groups/ads, budget/settings, and performance metrics (e.g. impressions, clicks, cost, and related reporting fields). Access scope: Google Ads API (adwords scope).
privacyPolicy.section3GA4Content:
When a user connects their Google account, YoAi requests access to Google Analytics 4 data via the following OAuth scopes:

(a) analytics.readonly: Read access to GA4 account identifiers, property configurations, data streams, audiences, and report data (sessions, users, events, conversions, traffic sources).

(b) analytics.edit: Write access to create GA4 properties on behalf of the user, configure data streams, define custom event definitions, create audiences, and set up conversion goals — only when the user explicitly initiates these actions through YoAi's setup wizards.

All Google Analytics data is used exclusively to display analytics dashboards within YoAi and to perform user-initiated configuration actions. Data is never transferred to third parties, sold, or used for advertising purposes.
privacyPolicy.section3GTMContent:
When a user connects their Google account, YoAi requests access to Google Tag Manager data via the following OAuth scopes:

(a) tagmanager.readonly: Read access to the user's GTM account identifiers, containers, workspaces, tags, triggers, variables, and version history — used to display the user's existing setup within YoAi's dashboard.

(b) tagmanager.edit.containers: Write access to create and modify tags (GA4 configuration, GA4 events, conversion tracking), triggers (page view, form submit, click events), and variables within the user's GTM container — only when the user explicitly initiates these actions through YoAi's setup wizards.

(c) tagmanager.publish: Permission to publish GTM container versions, only after the user reviews and approves YoAi-generated changes via in-app one-click action. Auto-publishing is never performed without explicit user action.

All Google Tag Manager data is used exclusively to display the user's GTM setup within YoAi and to deploy tags configured by the user. Data is never transferred to third parties or used for advertising purposes.
privacyPolicy.section4SubATitle: 4.1 Google API Services User Data Policy (Limited Use)
privacyPolicy.section4SubAContent: YoAi's use and transfer to any other app of information received from Google APIs will adhere to the Google API Services User Data Policy (https://developers.google.com/terms/api-services-user-data-policy), including the Limited Use requirements. Specifically: (a) Google user data is used only to provide and improve the reporting, monitoring, and campaign management features requested by the user within YoAi. (b) Google user data is not transferred to third parties except as necessary to provide or improve user-facing features, with the user's explicit consent, for security purposes, or to comply with applicable laws. (c) Google user data is not used for serving ads, including retargeting, personalized advertising, or interest-based advertising. (d) Google user data is not sold to any party. (e) Humans are not allowed to read Google user data unless the user has provided affirmative consent, it is necessary for security purposes, it is required to comply with applicable law, or the data is aggregated and anonymized for internal operations.
privacyPolicy.section4SubBContent:
YoAi's use of data received from Meta Platform APIs (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp) complies with the Meta Platform Terms (https://developers.facebook.com/terms/) and Meta's Data Use Restrictions. Specifically:

(a) Meta user data is used solely to provide the advertising management, reporting, campaign creation, and analytics features that the user explicitly initiates within the YoAi platform.

(b) Meta user data is not sold, licensed, or transferred to any third party — including data brokers, ad networks, or analytics providers — for any purpose.

(c) Meta user data is not used for surveillance, profiling unrelated to advertising, credit or insurance eligibility decisions, employment screening, or any purpose unrelated to the user's own advertising operations.

(d) Lead form data retrieved via the leads_retrieval permission is accessed only on behalf of the Page owner who created the form and is displayed exclusively within the YoAi dashboard for that user's own use.

(e) Instagram account data is used only for campaign targeting (selecting Instagram accounts as ad destinations) and displaying published media for ad creative selection.

(f) WhatsApp Business Account data is used only to enable Click-to-WhatsApp ad creation and to verify phone number availability.

(g) Access tokens are stored securely in httpOnly cookies and server-side storage. Tokens are never exposed to client-side JavaScript or logged in plain text.

(h) When a user disconnects their Meta integration or deauthorizes the app, all stored tokens, account mappings, and cached data are revoked and queued for deletion within 90 days.

(i) Users may request immediate data deletion by contacting info@yodijital.com or through the in-app data deletion flow.
privacyPolicy.section5Content: Account linking and authentication; providing performance reports, KPI dashboards, and analytics; in-product debugging and support (sensitive information such as credit card, password, or tokens is not logged); security measures and prevention of misuse.
privacyPolicy.section6Content: Reporting/cache data: 90 days (to the minimum extent necessary for functionality). When the user removes an integration (Disconnect), synchronization is stopped and the related authentication data is revoked; integration data held in the system is subject to deletion procedures.
privacyPolicy.section7Content: Data is not sold to third parties. Transfer to infrastructure providers (hosting, logging, etc.) may occur only to the limited extent necessary to provide the service. Disclosure to competent authorities may occur where required by law.
privacyPolicy.section8Content: Tokens and sensitive authentication data are not held in plain form on the client. Access keys are not shared in URLs; they are used only in secure headers. Technical and organizational measures are in place to prevent unauthorized access.
privacyPolicy.section9Content:
You may submit requests regarding the processing of your personal data through the following channel:

Email: info@yodijital.com
privacyPolicy.section10Content: This policy may be updated as needed. Updates will be published on this page.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion and Integration Removal

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: You may remove integrations you have connected in YoAi at any time and request deletion of your data.

dataDeletion.section1GoogleContent: When you disconnect Google Ads from the YoAi dashboard: Synchronization is stopped. Stored authorization data (token/refresh token) is revoked and/or invalidated. The related account mapping is queued for deletion.
dataDeletion.section1MetaContent: When you disconnect Meta from the YoAi dashboard: Synchronization is stopped. Authorization data is revoked and/or invalidated. The related account mapping is queued for deletion.
dataDeletion.section2Content: Integration tokens and authorization records; linked account mapping and connection metadata; report/cache summaries retained for product functionality.
dataDeletion.section3Content: After disconnect, data is removed from our systems within 90 days at the latest. You may contact us to request earlier deletion.
dataDeletion.section4Content: Email: info@yodijital.com | Subject: "YoAi Data Deletion Request" | Body: Your account email + the integration(s) you want deleted

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: This Cookie Policy explains the cookies and similar technologies used on the platform provided by YO Dijital Medya Anonim Şirketi ('YoAi') at yoai.yodijital.com.

cookiePolicy.section1Content: Cookies are small text files placed on your browser by websites. They are used to remember your preferences, manage your session, and collect usage statistics.
cookiePolicy.section2Essential: Essential Cookies: Required for core platform functionality. Session management (session_id), user authentication, and security checks fall under this category. The platform cannot function properly without these cookies.
cookiePolicy.section2Functional: Functional Cookies: Used to remember your preferences such as language (NEXT_LOCALE), selected ad account, and dashboard settings.
cookiePolicy.section2Analytics: Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how the platform is used. Page views, click rates, and performance metrics are collected through these cookies.
cookiePolicy.section2ThirdParty: Third-Party Cookies: As part of Google Ads and Meta (Facebook) integrations, these platforms may set their own cookies. These cookies are subject to the respective platforms' privacy policies.
cookiePolicy.section3Content: Session cookies: Deleted when you close your browser. Persistent cookies: Stored for up to 30 days (e.g., session ID, user preferences). Third-party cookies: Varies according to the respective platform's policy.
cookiePolicy.section4Content: You can delete or block cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling essential cookies may negatively affect the platform's functionality. You can update your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings.
cookiePolicy.section5Content: Our platform uses Cloudflare infrastructure. Cloudflare may set its own cookies (cf_clearance, __cf_bm, etc.) for bot protection and security verification. These cookies serve security purposes and are subject to Cloudflare's privacy policy.
cookiePolicy.section6Content: Cookie usage is carried out in accordance with the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK) No. 6698 and the European Union General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Essential cookies are used under legitimate interest, while other cookies are used with your explicit consent.
cookiePolicy.section7Content: This Cookie Policy may be updated from time to time. The current version is always published on this page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Body: These terms apply to users of the YoAi platform provided by YO Dijital Medya A.Ş.
terms.section2Body: YoAi is software that enables you to view performance data by connecting your ad accounts and (where applicable) to perform certain ad management actions.
terms.section3Body: Users may connect only ad accounts they are authorized to use. Users may not provide unauthorized access to third-party accounts.
terms.section4Body: Operations carried out through YoAi are subject to the policies and terms of the relevant platforms (Google Ads, Meta, etc.). Users may not use the service in ways that violate platform policies (e.g. unauthorized data collection, misuse, or misleading content).
terms.section5Body: Data displayed in YoAi is based on data provided by connected platforms (Google/Meta); discrepancies may occur due to delay, quotas, outages, or platform changes. YoAi is liable only to a limited extent for damage arising from third-party platform outages, API limits, or policy changes.
terms.section6Body: The user is responsible for the security of their account and the protection of access credentials.
terms.section7Body: YoAi may suspend or terminate access in case of misuse or violation.
terms.section8Body: These terms may be updated. The current version is published on this page.

assetGroup.headlinesHint: At least 3, up to 15 headlines (max 30 chars).

assetGroup.businessNameHint: Max 25 characters. This appears in your ads as your brand name.
assetGroup.videosHint: Add up to 5 YouTube video URLs. Min 10 seconds. Google may auto-generate videos if none provided.
assetGroup.sitelinksHint: Add at least 4 sitelinks with descriptions for better ad performance. Recommended: 6+.

articles.title: Content

articles.emptyDescription: Click the button above to create new SEO content.
articles.emptyForSite: No content for this site yet
articles.emptyForSiteDescription: Click the button above to generate new content for the active analyzed site.
articles.autoPublishFailedHint: Auto-publish failed — check the site connection and application password. The article was saved as a draft.
articles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this article?
articles.wpSettingsDesc: Enter your site details to connect via WordPress REST API. Application Password can be created from WordPress > Users > Profile > Application Passwords.
articles.wpPublishConfirm: Do you want to send this article to WordPress as a draft?
articles.onboardingHint: You must connect your website before you can create articles. Article generation and production settings appear once a site is connected.

sites.title: My Sites
sites.description: Connect your website to publish your articles.
sites.connectHint: Just enter your site address. You won't enter your password into YoAi — you approve it in one click from your own WordPress panel.
sites.noSitesDesc: Connect a WordPress site first to enable automatic publishing.
sites.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this site connection?
sites.errInvalidUrl: Enter a valid HTTPS site address.
sites.errNotWordpress: This address wasn't recognized as a site we can auto-publish to. You can still generate articles and publish them manually via Copy / Download HTML.
sites.errAuthBlocked: We reached your site, but your server isn’t passing the authentication credentials to WordPress (the Authorization header is being blocked). This is not a username or password error. Enable forwarding of the Authorization header to PHP in your hosting/server settings, or connect using the “Other site / custom software” (Webhook) method.
sites.errSiteMismatch: The approved site does not match the entered address.
sites.errRestBlocked: Couldn't establish an automatic publishing connection to this address (the site may not expose a publishing API, or a firewall may be blocking it). You can generate articles and add them to your site via Copy / Download HTML.
sites.errNoAppPasswords: One-click publishing authorization isn't enabled on this site. Ask the site admin to enable it, or add articles manually via Copy / Download HTML.
sites.publishTargetDesc: Your articles are published to the website in your business profile.
sites.authorizeHint: If your site runs on WordPress, you approve it in one click from your own panel — your password is never entered into YoAi. On a different platform, generate the article and publish it via Copy / Download HTML.
sites.notAuthorizedDesc: You need to authorize once to publish articles to your site.
sites.noProfileUrl: No website address found in your business profile. Please complete your profile first.
sites.wpIncompatibleNote: Your website is not eligible for one-click automatic publishing. You can connect your own system via webhook below and send your articles automatically.

webhook.title: Another site / custom software
webhook.subtitle: For non-WordPress or custom-built sites.
webhook.secretHint: Use this key to verify the request signature on your own server. The full key won't be shown again after saving — copy it now.
webhook.errInvalidUrl: Enter a valid HTTPS webhook URL.
webhook.errWeakSecret: The secret key must be at least 8 characters.
webhook.errSaveFailed: Couldn't save the webhook. Please try again.
webhook.howIntro: On each publish, YoAi POSTs the JSON below to your webhook URL and signs the request with your secret (HMAC-SHA256). You verify the signature and create the article in your own system.
webhook.howResponse: Respond with 2xx. Optionally return { "url": "..." } and YoAi will save the published link.

wpManual.title: Connect with an Application Password
wpManual.subtitle: Recommended for WordPress sites.
wpManual.passwordPlaceholder: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx
wpManual.passwordHint: The application password generated from your WordPress profile — not your normal login password.
wpManual.howTitle: How to get an application password?
wpManual.how1: 1) Log in to your WordPress admin → Users → Profile.
wpManual.how2: 2) Scroll to the “Application Passwords” section at the bottom.
wpManual.how3: 3) Enter “YoAi SEO” as the name and click “Add New Application Password”.
wpManual.how4: 4) Copy the generated password and paste it here along with your username.
wpManual.errWeakPassword: The application password looks incomplete. Paste the full password WordPress gave you.
wpManual.errAuthFailed: Username or application password is incorrect.
wpManual.errAuthBlocked: We reached your site, but your server isn’t passing the authentication credentials to WordPress (the Authorization header is being blocked). This is not a password error — the details you entered may be correct. Enable forwarding of the Authorization header to PHP in your hosting/server settings, or connect using the “Other site / custom software” (Webhook) method.
wpManual.errUnreachable: Couldn't reach the site (timeout). The site may be very slow; try again shortly.
wpManual.errNotWordpress: No WordPress REST API found at this address. Check the site address.
wpManual.errSaveFailed: Couldn't save the connection. Please try again.
wpManual.authBlockedFixHint: Add these lines to the top of the .htaccess file in your site's root, save, then click Retry. Most shared servers (LiteSpeed / Apache 2.4.13+) support this.

planDescriptions.basic: All the tools you need for basic ad management.
planDescriptions.premium: The full marketing suite — AI Strategy, YoAlgorithm, CRM and Email Marketing included.

pricing.heroSubtitle: Plans that scale with the number of ad accounts you manage — no hidden fees.
pricing.trialNote: * 14-day free trial — available on the Premium plan.
pricing.optimizationNote: The Optimization feature is not available during the trial.
pricing.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to the questions you may have.

faq.q: Can I change or cancel my plan anytime?
faq.a: Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade or cancel your plan at any time. There is no commitment.

faq.q: Can I add more ad accounts later?
faq.a: Yes. Every plan scales with the number of ad accounts; you can add new accounts whenever you need them.

faq.q: What is the difference between monthly and yearly billing?
faq.a: When you choose yearly billing, a 30% discount applies to all plans.

faq.q: Which ad platforms do you support?
faq.a: You can create and manage your Google Ads and Meta (Facebook, Instagram) ads from a single panel.

faq.q: Do I need a credit card to start the free trial?
faq.a: No. You don't need to enter any credit card details to start your free trial.

faq.q: Who is the Enterprise plan for?
faq.a: It is designed for agencies and large teams managing 7 or more ad accounts, with custom pricing based on your needs.

pricing.ctaSubtitle: Start your free trial. No credit card required.
